description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure depicted in a casual urban outfit, featuring a loose hoodie with a front pocket and drawstrings, paired with fitted pants and sturdy shoes. The figure has a youthful appearance, with a slightly tousled, short hairstyle and a slim build. The arms are extended horizontally in a T-pose, which is typical for digital character modeling. The clothing appears soft and comfortable, with subtle folds and creases suggesting fabric texture. The shoes are robust and practical, suitable for walking on city streets. The overall look is modern and relaxed, fitting well within contemporary urban environments.
description: A stylized adult male in a casual hoodie, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes, standing in a T-pose with a youthful, tousled hairstyle. The outfit and posture suggest a modern, relaxed urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the hoodie, hair, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the hoodie, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, front of the hoodie with drawstrings, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the hoodie, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hoodie and fitted pants with practical shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
